overview: Chefiyke is a premium personal brand platform and business engine for www.chefiyke.com. It combines a public-facing authority site with a secure Virtual Office for full backend control — including a pricing engine, contact manager, systems portfolio, affiliate system, client portal, and legal compliance pages.
features: Global save/persistence across all editable modules
ON/OFF visibility toggles for systems, contacts, pricing, and payments
Secure payment configuration (Paystack, Flutterwave, bank, crypto) with private keys server-only
Full-CRUD Systems Manager with /systems public portfolio page
Contact Manager with 17 platforms and visibility control
Back button and Return to Homepage navigation in Virtual Office
Legal pages (Terms, Privacy, Disclaimer, Refund) editable from backend
Chefiyke-branded login and auth screens with no external platform references
Production security hardening — no secrets exposed, backend trust model enforced
Builder's Dashboard client portal for consulting clients
